style: Bold coastal travel advertising: deep navy, sea blue, puffin orange, warm sand, premium but friendly.

sourceImages.label: Home
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: See today’s sailings, passenger reviews, gallery photos and quick booking from one welcoming home screen.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: Plan your Coquet Island trip in seconds — sailings, reviews and booking all in the Puffin Cruises app.

sourceImages.label: Live Boat Tracker
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Track the cruise route, harbour points, parking, dining and live crew-shared boat position on the interactive map.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: New: live boat tracking. Follow the Puffin Cruises boat as it heads between Amble Harbour and Coquet Island.

sourceImages.label: Wildlife Guide
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Learn what wildlife you might see around Coquet Island with seasonal species cards and fun facts.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: Puffins, seals, terns and more — explore Coquet Island wildlife before you step onboard.

sourceImages.label: Booking
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Choose your cruise, date, time and passengers with a clear step-by-step booking flow.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: Ready for a coastal adventure? Pick your sailing and reserve your seats from the app.

sourceImages.label: Tickets
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Keep QR boarding passes, cruise details, Wallet actions and crew updates together.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: No paper needed — keep your Puffin Cruises ticket and boarding QR ready on your phone.

sourceImages.label: Puffin Club
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Track loyalty progress, referral rewards, past trips and arrival guidance in your profile.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: Join the Puffin Club — earn loyalty perks and share rewards with friends.

sourceImages.label: Onboarding
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: A friendly first-launch guide introduces booking, tickets, wildlife, arrival info and live tracking.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: First time sailing with us? The app walks you through everything before your trip.

sourceImages.label: Arrival Guide
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Find parking, check-in details, accessibility notes, weather policy and what to bring.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: Arrive relaxed — parking, check-in info and what to bring are all in the app.

sourceImages.label: Boat And Island
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Use this real boat and island image as the hero background for social posts and App Store cover artwork.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: Set sail from Amble Harbour to beautiful Coquet Island with Puffin Cruises.

sourceImages.label: Extra Creative
sourceImages.appStoreSubtitle: Use as a flexible supporting visual for seasonal campaigns, Facebook posts or final App Store slide variations.
sourceImages.facebookCaption: Make memories on the Northumberland coast with Puffin Cruises.

recommendedFacebookPosts.copy: You can now follow the Puffin Cruises boat live in the app. Perfect for checking the sailing route, harbour points and where the boat is during the trip.
Planning a trip to Coquet Island? Browse sailings, reserve seats and keep your boarding pass ready in the Puffin Cruises app.
Puffins, seals and seabirds are waiting around Coquet Island. Explore the wildlife guide before your cruise.
